caption: A man wearing a dark green t-shirt, a green baseball cap, and black over-ear headphones is seen speaking into a professional microphone in what appears to be a clothing store or studio. His t-shirt features the white text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT". The background is filled with framed photographs on the wall, clothing racks, and a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt. Throughout the sequence, the man is smiling and laughing as he talks, with his facial expressions shifting from a wide grin to a more closed-mouthed smile. A red plastic cup is partially visible in the lower foreground of the final scene. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular black and white logo on the left and a red text logo on the right that reads "DRESSY FLY TOI". The camera remains static, focusing on the man from the chest up.
